author: @desgnwitkinsley
text:
A lot of people ask me where I get the mockups and high-resolution images I use in my designs.

The answer? A few essential Figma  plugins that can significantly improve both your design process and presentation.

But here’s a tip—Pinterest isn’t a Figma  plugin, but it’s my go-to source for high-quality images. I also rely on Freepik  to find the perfect visuals for any design.

If you’re looking to level up your design workflow, save these resources and give it a shot. 

#figmaplugin #uxdesign #uidesign  #figmatutorial
